❯ /advisor
  ⎿  Advisor set to Sonnet 4.6

❯ /advisor
  ⎿  Advisor disabled

❯ /advisor
  ⎿  Advisor set to Opus 4.8

❯ /model

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Select model
  Switch between Claude models. Your pick becomes the default for new sessions. For other/previous model names, specify with --model.

    1. Default (recommended)  Sonnet 4.6 · Best for everyday tasks
    2. Sonnet (1M context)    Sonnet 4.6 with 1M context · Draws from usage credits · $3/$15 per Mtok
  ❯ 3. Opus ✔                 Opus 4.8 · Most capable for complex work · ~2× usage vs Sonnet
    4. Haiku                  Haiku 4.5 · Fastest for quick answers

  ◈ Max effort ←/→ to adjust

  Use /fast to turn on Fast mode (Opus 4.8).

  Enter to set as default · s to use this session only · Esc to cancel
